name: Pitfall!
description:
Pitfall! is a side-scrolling platform game set within a jungle environment. The player controls Pitfall Harry, an adventurer tasked with recovering 32 treasures within a 20-minute time limit. The jungle terrain is divided into numerous screens connected horizontally. Harry can run, jump, climb, and swing across vines to navigate the obstacles. Obstacles include pits, quicksand, rolling logs, scorpions, campfires, poisonous cobras, and crocodiles. 

Harry can jump over smaller obstacles or swing over larger ones using vines strategically placed throughout the level. He can also descend into underground tunnels to bypass the surface challenges, but these tunnels present their own dangers and require precise timing. Points are awarded for collecting treasure, each type of which is worth different point values, and points are deducted for touching scorpions or falling into pits. Contact with crocodiles and campfires is fatal. Harry starts with three lives. The game ends when the timer runs out or all lives are lost.

controls.arrow_up: Jump / Climb (when near a vine or ladder)
controls.arrow_down: Descend into tunnels (when near a tunnel entrance)
controls.space: Swing from vine (when near a vine)
